name: Habitica
compose:
name: slashnode-habitica
services:
  server:
    image: awinterstein/habitica-server:5.48.2
    container_name: habitica-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: 'sh -c "perl -0pi -e ''s/upgradeInsecureRequests: IS_PROD \\? \\[\\] : null,?/upgradeInsecureRequests: null/g'' /var/lib/habitica/website/server/middlewares/index.js /var/lib/habitica/website/transpiled-babel/middlewares/index.js && printenv | grep -v ''no_proxy'' >> /etc/environment && /etc/init.d/cron start && node /var/lib/habitica/website/transpiled-babel/index.js"'
    depends_on:
      - mongo
    environment:
      NODE_DB_URI: mongodb://habitica-mongo/habitica
      BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3944
      INVITE_ONLY: 'false'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3944:3000
  mongo:
    image: mongo:8.0.11
    container_name: habitica-mongo
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '--replSet'
      - rs
      - '--bind_ip_all'
      - '--port'
      - '27017'
    volumes:
      - mongo_data-db:/data/db:rw
      - mongo_data-dbconf:/data/configdb
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  mongo_data-db:
    name: slashnode-habitica_mongo_data-db
  mongo_data-dbconf:
    name: slashnode-habitica_mongo_data-dbconf
